UCS-79  POSTWELD HEAT TREATMENT REQUIREMENTS FOR CARBON AND LOW ALLOY STEELS. (a) PWHT shall be performed on carbon and low alloy steel vessels when the thickness exceeds the limits specified in this paragraph for the applicable P-Number group. (b) The PWHT temperature and holding time shall be as specified in Table UCS-79 for the applicable P-Number. (c) PWHT procedures shall comply with UW-40. For general PWHT requirements, see UW-28. For exemptions from PWHT, refer to UW-29. Impact testing after PWHT shall be performed as required by UCS-56. Test coupons shall be heat-treated in accordance with UCS-85. See also UHA-34 for high alloy PWHT requirements.
